text.title: Rails Decomposition Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — extend existing convention; mixing styles is worse than one consistent style

branch.question: Endpoint count ≥ 20 and project is product (not prototype)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — thin controllers + ActiveRecord cover small CRUD apps

branch.question: Have you locked a canonical Service return shape in CONTRIBUTING.md?

conclusion.verdict: agree Result vs entity-or-raise before scaffolding any Service

branch.question: Do controllers need multi-scope filter compositions?

conclusion.verdict: wrap compositions in Query Object that calls existing model scopes
apply remaining rules — Pundit policy_scope, Form via ActiveModel, explicit Serializer fields

text.example: convention=none → qualifies_for_decomp=true → return_shape_locked=true → filter_composition=true → wrap multi-scope filters in Query Objects that compose existing model scopes.
